title: cMCP Catalog Entry
description: A single entry in the cMCP Gateway approved tool catalog, representing one tool from one MCP server.

tool_name.description: The name the agent uses to invoke this tool, e.g. salesforce.query.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for the MCP server.

url.description: Base URL of the MCP server endpoint.

tls_fingerprint.description: Colon-separated SHA-256 TLS certificate fingerprint in OpenSSL format.

spiffe_id.description: SPIFFE SVID for this server; required when SPIFFE is deployed, null otherwise.

transport.description: Transport protocol; stdio is excluded from Phase 1.

description.description: The tool description text as shown in the catalog.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool input parameters.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool output; null if not specified.

definition_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON of approved_definition; used for drift detection.

compliance_domain.description: Compliance classification domain for this tool.

requires_baa.description: True if a Business Associate Agreement is required to invoke this tool.

sensitivity_level.description: Data sensitivity level of information this tool accesses or returns.

added_at.description: UTC timestamp at which this entry was added to the catalog.

approved_by.description: Identity of the person or system that approved this catalog entry.

catalog_exception.description: True if this entry was added via the break-glass exception procedure.
